institution.name: South Hills School of Business & Technology

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 60% at South Hills School of Business & Technology vs the 2003–2007 baseline (241 vs 599).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at South Hills School of Business & Technology rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.7k → $13.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Hills School of Business & Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South Hills School of Business & Technology rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (62.3% → 78.3%).
